positive: Intricate mandala design featuring stylized celestial flora and fauna, such as abstract crescent moons, starry vines, and geometric astral patterns. The style is highly detailed vector engraving meets fine-line sketch art. The composition must be symmetrical, centralized, and read as a single, cohesive graphic for apparel printing. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blue, metallic gold, and stark white lines. Strong silhouettes and crisp linework are paramount.
